about.hero_title: About Nordic Marketing - Denmark's Marketing Agency
about.hero_desc: A Danish digital marketing agency focused on results and transparency
about.story_p1: Nordic Marketing is an ambitious Danish digital marketing agency based in Copenhagen. We specialize in helping businesses grow online through effective digital marketing and professional web design.
about.story_p2: Our team combines solid expertise in marketing, economics and technology. We master both the creative side of marketing and the technical implementation – from strategy to finished website and campaign.
about.story_p3: We believe that professional digital marketing should be accessible to businesses of all sizes. That's why we offer transparent prices, measurable results and personal service to every customer.
about.story_p4: With a sharp focus on the latest trends in SEO, GEO, advertising and AI technology, we ensure that our customers are always one step ahead of the competition. Your success is our mission.
about.mission_desc: To democratize digital marketing by delivering professional solutions at fair prices. We combine data-driven insights with creative execution to create measurable results for our customers.
about.vision_desc: To be the preferred marketing partner for ambitious businesses seeking growth through effective and transparent digital marketing.
about.value1_desc: Clear communication and no hidden costs. We report continuously and you always have full overview of your investment.
about.value2_desc: Everything we do is data-driven and measured on concrete KPIs. We focus on ROI and real business value.
about.value3_desc: We see ourselves as an extension of your team. Your success is our success, and we invest in every collaboration.
about.value4_desc: We constantly stay updated on the latest trends and technologies to ensure your competitive advantage.
about.cta_desc: Let's have a chat about how we can help your business

seo_service.title: SEO Agency Denmark - Professional Search Engine Optimization
seo_service.desc: Get visible on Google and attract more customers organically. We help Danish businesses rank higher through technical SEO, on-page optimization and quality link building.
seo_service.features_title: What's included in our SEO package?
seo_service.feature1_desc: Complete review of your website's technical health. We identify and fix issues holding you back.
seo_service.feature2_desc: We find the keywords your customers use. Focus on Danish searches with high potential and manageable competition.
seo_service.feature3_desc: Optimization of titles, meta descriptions, headings, content and internal links for maximum visibility.
seo_service.feature4_desc: Quality links from relevant Danish websites that strengthen your authority and rankings.
seo_service.feature5_desc: Optimization for local searches, Google Business Profile and local citations for businesses with physical presence.
seo_service.feature6_desc: Detailed reports with rankings, traffic and progress. You always have full overview of your results.
seo_service.process_step1_desc: We analyze your website and competitors to identify opportunities.
seo_service.process_step2_desc: We develop a customized SEO strategy with clear goals and priorities.
seo_service.process_step3_desc: We optimize your website and start the link building work.
seo_service.process_step4_desc: Continuous monitoring, adjustment and improvement of your SEO.
seo_service.faq1_question: What does SEO cost in Denmark?
seo_service.faq1_answer: Professional SEO at Nordic Marketing starts from 2,500 DKK per month. The price includes technical SEO audit, keyword research, on-page optimization and monthly reporting. Contact us for a customized quote based on your needs.
seo_service.faq2_question: How long does it take to see SEO results?
seo_service.faq2_answer: SEO is a long-term investment. Typically you see the first improvements after 3-6 months, with significant results after 6-12 months. The timeline depends on competition in your industry and your website's current state.
seo_service.faq3_question: What's the difference between SEO and GEO?
seo_service.faq3_answer: SEO optimizes your website for traditional search engines like Google. GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) optimizes your content for AI search engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity. Nordic Marketing offers both as a combined service.
seo_service.faq4_question: Do you offer SEO throughout Denmark?
seo_service.faq4_answer: Yes, Nordic Marketing offers SEO services to businesses throughout Denmark. We work with customers in Copenhagen, Aarhus, Odense, Aalborg and all other Danish cities. Our digital services can be delivered regardless of location.
seo_service.cta_title: Ready to rank higher on Google?
seo_service.cta_desc: Book a free SEO analysis and get concrete recommendations for your website

google_service.title: Google Ads Agency Denmark - Professional Google Advertising
google_service.desc: Get more customers through Google search advertising. We set up and optimize your Google Ads campaigns for maximum ROI and minimal waste.
google_service.features_title: What's included in our Google Ads service?
google_service.feature1_desc: We find the most profitable keywords for your business with focus on Danish searches.
google_service.feature2_desc: Structured campaigns with relevant ad groups and targeted ads.
google_service.feature3_desc: A/B testing of ads, bid adjustment and negative keywords for better performance.
google_service.feature4_desc: Setup of tracking so we can measure and optimize towards your most important actions.
google_service.feature5_desc: Banner ads and remarketing to people who have visited your website.
google_service.feature6_desc: Detailed reports with clicks, conversions, CPA and ROI.
google_service.faq_title: Frequently asked questions about Google Ads
google_service.faq1_question: What does Google Ads management cost in Denmark?
google_service.faq1_answer: Google Ads management at Nordic Marketing starts from 2,500 DKK per month. This includes setup, optimization and reporting. The ad budget comes on top and is agreed individually based on your goals.
google_service.faq2_question: How quickly do you see results with Google Ads?
google_service.faq2_answer: Google Ads gives immediate results. You can see traffic and conversions from day 1. Optimal performance is typically achieved after 2-4 weeks of optimization, when there's enough data to adjust bids and targeting.
google_service.faq3_question: What's a good ROI on Google Ads?
google_service.faq3_answer: A good ROAS (Return On Ad Spend) depends on your industry and margins. Generally we aim for minimum 3:1 ROAS, meaning 3 DKK in revenue for every 1 DKK spent on ads.
google_service.faq4_question: Can you take over our existing Google Ads account?
google_service.faq4_answer: Yes, we can take over and optimize existing Google Ads accounts. We start with a free audit where we identify improvement opportunities and potential savings.
google_service.cta_title: Ready to get more customers with Google Ads?
google_service.cta_desc: Book a free Google Ads audit and see how we can improve your results

facebook_service.title: Facebook Advertising Denmark - Professional Meta Ads Agency
facebook_service.desc: Reach your target audience on Facebook and Instagram with targeted ads. We help Danish businesses get more customers through social media.
facebook_service.features_title: What's included in our Facebook Ads service?
facebook_service.feature1_desc: We identify and build precise audiences based on demographics, interests and behavior.
facebook_service.feature2_desc: Professional ad copy and creative content that captures attention.
facebook_service.feature3_desc: Systematic testing of ads, audiences and messages for optimal performance.
facebook_service.feature4_desc: Target ads at people who have visited your website or interacted with your content.
facebook_service.feature5_desc: Stories, Reels and Feed ads on Instagram that engage your audience.
facebook_service.feature6_desc: Detailed reports with reach, engagement, clicks and conversions.
facebook_service.faq_title: Frequently asked questions about Facebook advertising
facebook_service.faq1_question: What does Facebook advertising cost in Denmark?
facebook_service.faq1_answer: Facebook advertising management at Nordic Marketing starts from 2,500 DKK per month. This includes campaign setup, audience analysis, A/B testing and ongoing optimization. The ad budget comes on top and is agreed individually.
facebook_service.faq2_question: Is Facebook advertising still effective in 2026?
facebook_service.faq2_answer: Yes, Facebook and Instagram are still among the most effective advertising platforms with over 3.5 million Danish users. Meta's advanced targeting makes it possible to reach exactly your target audience.
facebook_service.faq3_question: How much should I spend on Facebook ads?
facebook_service.faq3_answer: We recommend a minimum ad budget of 3,000-5,000 DKK/month to get enough data for optimization. The optimal budget depends on your goals and industry.
facebook_service.faq4_question: Can you help with Instagram advertising?
facebook_service.faq4_answer: Yes, Instagram and Facebook Ads are managed through the same platform (Meta). We optimize campaigns for both platforms and choose the best placements based on your target audience.
facebook_service.cta_title: Ready to reach more customers on social media?
facebook_service.cta_desc: Book a free consultation and let us create a strategy for your business

webdesign_service.title: Web Design Agency Denmark - Professional Websites
webdesign_service.desc: Your website is your digital business card. We build modern, fast and conversion-optimized websites for businesses throughout Denmark.
webdesign_service.features_title: What do you get with a website from Nordic Marketing?
webdesign_service.feature1_desc: Your website looks great on all devices - desktop, tablet and mobile.
webdesign_service.feature2_desc: Optimized websites that load quickly and score high on Google PageSpeed.
webdesign_service.feature3_desc: Built with SEO in mind from the start - correct structure, meta tags and schema markup.
webdesign_service.feature4_desc: HTTPS security included - important for both users and Google ranking.
webdesign_service.feature5_desc: Google Analytics and conversion tracking so you can follow your visitors.
webdesign_service.feature6_desc: Professional contact form that sends leads directly to your inbox.
webdesign_service.cities_desc: We create websites for businesses across the country
webdesign_service.faq_title: Frequently asked questions about web design
webdesign_service.faq1_question: What does a website cost in Denmark?
webdesign_service.faq1_answer: A professional website from Nordic Marketing starts from 5,000 DKK for a landing page. A full business website typically costs 10,000-25,000 DKK depending on scope and functionality.
webdesign_service.faq2_question: How long does it take to make a website?
webdesign_service.faq2_answer: A simple landing page can be made in 1-2 weeks. A full business website typically takes 3-6 weeks, depending on scope and how quickly we receive feedback and content.
webdesign_service.faq3_answer: Yes, all our websites are SEO-optimized from the start. This includes technical SEO, fast load time, mobile-friendly design and correct structure with meta tags and schema markup.
webdesign_service.faq4_question: Can you make websites for restaurants?
webdesign_service.faq4_answer: Yes, we have experience with websites for restaurants and cafes. We can integrate online menus, table reservations, Google Maps and Google Business Profile.
webdesign_service.cta_desc: Book a free consultation and let's talk about your project
